title: GRIFEMA GE1303-1 Hose Pipe Spray Gun Set, 8 Adjustable Patterns Nozzles, High Pressure Garden Sprayer For Lawn & Garden Watering Equipment Include Hose Connectors, Orange/Black
features: [One Key Control]: Compared to traditional spray gun, our spray gun don't need to keep pressing the handle with your hands to control the water flow. Just turn the water flow switch, which Can Spray Water Continuously Without Pressure.
[8 Adjustable Nozzles]: This hose pipe spray gun has 8 watering patterns (Center, Spray, Shower, Rinse, Flat, Smoke, Cone and Spray), meet all your watering needs.
[Widely Applicable]: Spray gun fits all standard garden hose pipe. It's ideal for watering plants or lawn, washing pets, cleaning windows, and other outdoor cleaning.

[Durable & Anti-slip]: Garden spray gun is made of high-quality ABS plastic, the handle is equipped with an anti-slip texture design for your comfort, easy to control. Cold and light resistant, sealed and waterproof, durable.

[Package Include]: 1x 8 Pattern Nozzle, 1x water-stop connector; 1x 1/2"&3/4" 2 in 1 faucet adapter, 1x repair connector and fitting sets, you don't need to buy extra accessories. It is used for European standard 1/2" 12.5mm hosepipe (OD15~18mm).
description: From the manufacturer About GRIFEMA GRIFEMA is becoming one of the famous manufacturers and suppliers of sanitary ware and lightings in Spain. All product ranges offer a new design from your kitchen, bathroom, to outdoor; The minimalist is incorporated into exceptional design. GRIFEMA: Start your exquisite life. GRIFEMA Watering with ease, living comfortably Original GRIFEMA spare parts provide proven quality and durability. Integrated into every corner of your home with a modern design, make cleaning your home a pleasure with GRIFEMA watering accessories. INSTALLATION STEPS 8 SPRAY MODES The garden spray gun has 8 types of watering settings that can be easily adjusted with the Spin-click spray selector (centre, mist, shower, rinse, dish, soak, cone and sprinkler), to meet all your watering needs.
